message:
fix(sql): resolve compiled execution bugs and memory leaks

- Fix analyzeExpr to add columns to input_column_order for layout building
- Set compilable=false for GROUP BY queries to trigger fallback
- Add type resolution from table schema for unknown column types
- Add generateWithLayoutAndTypes() for proper type mapping
- Fix memory leak: free plan sources/methods slices in planner deinit
- Add ColumnLayout.deinit() to free allocated column info slices
- Remove unused PlanBuilder field from Planner
